allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
feat(android): add hybrid app detection with confidence scoring

Improve Android app detection robustness by combining AccessibilityService
with UsageStatsManager for cross-validation and fallback capability.

Changes:
- Fix getForegroundApp.kt query window from 1 hour to 5 seconds
- Add structured ForegroundAppResult type with Success/Stale/Error states
- Create HybridAppDetector for dual-source detection with automatic fallback
- Add ServiceHealthMonitor to detect when AccessibilityService dies
- Implement confidence scoring (HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW/VERY_LOW) for detections
- Integrate hybrid detection into MyAccessibilityService lifecycle
EOF
)")
